text:
1. First, note the time zone offsets: Asia/Kolkata is UTC + 5:30, and US/Mountain is UTC - 7:00.
2. Calculate the time difference between the two time - zones: (UTC - 7:00)-(UTC + 5:30)=-12:30.
3. Subtract 12 hours and 30 minutes from 07:00. 07:00 - 12:30 = 18:30 (previous day). So the date becomes December 13, 1626.
FINAL_ANSWER: 1626 - 12 - 13 18:30
